历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 7564 → 11145 → 9669 → 10643 → 10772, showing an overall backward trend. After a significant backward shift in 2022, it fluctuated within the 9600-10800 range in the past three years, with a baseline of approximately 10772 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 113 in 2021-2022, 116 in 2023, 116 in 2024, 111 in 2025, and 108 in 2026, a decrease of 3 compared to 2025, indicating a slight reduction in enrollment and slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; approximately 110th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (113th in 2026), with stable rankings in the 100-113 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. Douyin popularity ranking 50th, rated as 'relatively popular'. No significant negative public opinion or admission gaps in recent years, with a stable reputation. Specializing in maritime transportation, with transportation engineering, ship and ocean engineering as traditional advantageous fields, but no A- or above discipline records in the fifth round of discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Automation continue to have high social popularity. The number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is approximately 114,000, a decrease of about 3% from 117,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10772, the slight reduction in 2026 enrollment (108 compared to 111, a reduction of about 2.7%), a slight decrease in the total number of examinees, and a stable reputation, combined with the easing of competition due to the decline in examinee numbers, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 10700, with a range of 10400-10900.
